packageRules.description: Automerge dev/test/lint tooling in the optional-dependencies extras and PEP 735 dependency-groups (PEP 621 emits depType project.optional-dependencies for every extra; release-only/docs tools are excluded again by the overrides below)
Automerge non-major updates for stable (>=1.0.0) runtime dependencies (project.dependencies only; build-system.requires is only exercised by the release build)
Automerge GitHub Actions minor, patch and digest updates
Override: never automerge docs tooling — the docs extra is built by Read the Docs, not exercised by PR CI
Override: never automerge twine — only exercised by the release workflow (twine check on publish), not by PR CI
Override: never automerge the PyPI publish action — only runs on release and is not exercised by the PR test workflow
Override: require Dependency Dashboard approval for all major updates and never automerge them
